content.text: Step 1 findings: docs-verify peers returned the following. The internal docs at docs/foo.md describe behavior X but the code in src/bar.py implements behavior Y; this drift affects the acceptance criteria. The external docs omit the new flag entirely. Relevant files: src/bar.py, docs/foo.md, tests/test_bar.py. No compaction occurred during Step 1. The reconciled evidence is written to the Step 1 artifact under .devflow/tmp. Carry these findings into Step 3 drafting: the drift, the missing external doc, and the three relevant files must all be reflected in the issue body and the acceptance criteria before the no-options gate can pass.
